info.name: Sgraal API
info.description: Memory governance protocol for AI agents — v1 public API. Preflight scoring, healing, compliance, and fleet intelligence endpoints. Set the {{api_key}} environment variable to your sg_live_ key.

body.raw:
{
  "memory_state": [
    {
      "id": "mem_001",
      "content": "Customer preferred contact method: email (verified 2026-02-15)",
      "type": "preference",
      "timestamp_age_days": 12,
      "source_trust": 0.9,
      "source_conflict": 0.1,
      "downstream_count": 3
    },
    {
      "id": "mem_002",
      "content": "Account balance as of last sync: $50,000",
      "type": "tool_state",
      "timestamp_age_days": 3,
      "source_trust": 0.7,
      "source_conflict": 0.3,
      "downstream_count": 5
    }
  ],
  "action_type": "irreversible",
  "domain": "fintech",
  "agent_id": "agent_finance_001"
}

request.description: Score a memory state and get a recommended action (USE_MEMORY / WARN / ASK_USER / BLOCK). Returns omega_mem_final, component_breakdown, repair_plan, and 80+ analytics modules.
Preflight with score_history for trend detection (CUSUM, EWMA, BOCPD, HMM regime detection).
Preflight with custom decision thresholds overriding the default warn/ask_user/block boundaries.
Preflight with a compliance profile (GENERAL, EU_AI_ACT, FDA_510K, HIPAA). Critical violations override recommended_action to BLOCK.
Preflight with surgical BLOCK — only halts steps that depend on stale entries while safe steps proceed.
Preflight with epsilon-Differential Privacy via Laplace mechanism. Response includes privacy_guarantee.
Preflight with PageRank authority scores over memory dependency graph. Adds r_importance as 13th component.
Run up to 100 preflight requests in a single call. Returns an array of preflight responses in the same order.
Return a human-readable explanation of the preflight decision including Shapley values, causal graph, and root cause analysis.
Close an outcome from a previous preflight call. Status: success / failure / partial. Optionally pass failure_components for RL attribution.
Close an outcome as failure with component attribution. Updates the RL Q-table for future decision improvement.
Apply a healing action (REFETCH / VERIFY_WITH_SOURCE / REBUILD_WORKING_SET) to a memory entry. Increments healing_counter and returns Lyapunov stability guarantee.
Verify a memory entry against its original source. Used when source_conflict is elevated.
Heal multiple memory entries in a single call. Entries without an explicit action use the repair_plan recommendation.
Public service discovery document. Returns API version, capabilities, supported memory types, and compliance profiles. No auth required.
Liveness probe. Returns 200 OK with service version and dependency status. No auth required.

query.description: Comma-separated recent omega scores for Kalman trend forecast

request.description: Run Z3 SMT verification of healing policies and compliance rules. Optional history param triggers Kalman filter forecast of collapse risk.
Download the OpenAPI 3.1 specification for all Sgraal endpoints. No auth required.
Create a Stripe customer, subscribe to the free tier, and return a plaintext sg_live_ API key. The key is shown once — store it immediately.
Generate an additional API key for your account. Returns the plaintext key once — store it. Requires an existing valid key to authenticate.
Aggregate stats for the caller: total calls, decision breakdown, average omega, top domains.
Estimated ROI from prevented incidents: blocked-risk cost savings, successful heals, avoided rollbacks.
Estimate LLM tokens saved by blocking unreliable memory reads before they enter the context window.
Breakdown of preflight calls by memory type (episodic, semantic, preference, tool_state, shared_workflow, policy, identity).
Tamper-evident log of every preflight/heal call. Filter by decision, agent_id, domain, or date range.
Export audit log in Splunk-compatible format. Also supports: datadog, elastic, csv.
High-level insights: fleet health, recurring risk components, agent rankings, and actionable recommendations.
Compliance profile catalog: GENERAL, EU_AI_ACT, FDA_510K, HIPAA. Includes article mappings and enforcement rules.
Generate a GDPR Article 15 / 17 / 20 report for a data subject (access, erasure, portability).
EU AI Act compliance report: Article 9 (risk management), Article 12 (record-keeping), Article 13 (transparency). SIEM-exportable.
Current SLA metrics: latency p95, uptime, decision accuracy. Returns per-domain breakdown when configured.
NIST AI Risk Management Framework controls mapping. No auth required.
Issue a W3C Verifiable Credential attesting to the agent's memory governance score. Returns a signed VC with proof.
Verify a previously issued W3C Verifiable Credential. Returns verification status and credential details.
Permanently destroy memory entries. Logged to audit trail with reason. Irreversible.
Preflight check for OpenAI function calls. Infers action_type from function name and arguments, then runs full scoring.
Preflight check for Anthropic Claude tool_use calls. Infers action_type from tool name, then runs full scoring.
Assess recoverability of damaged memory entries. Returns per-entry recovery probability, suggested actions, and MTTR estimate.
Refine low-quality memory entries (enrich metadata, increase specificity, resolve conflicts). Returns improved MemCube entries.
Rate-distortion optimal compression: consolidate redundant memory entries while preserving information value.
Fleet-wide attack signature registry. Every MANIPULATED BLOCK extracts a signature to Redis for fleet immunity. Filter by domain.
List of agent_ids auto-flagged from provenance chains during MANIPULATED BLOCK events.
Detect agents whose memory state has diverged from fleet consensus. Returns per-agent divergence scores.
Detect agents gaming the scoring system (suspicious low-omega patterns, adversarial memory shaping).
Export 8 attack pattern datasets for red-team exercises and fleet hardening.
Retrieve the composite governance score (0-100) for a specific agent. Aggregates preflight history, heal success rate, and compliance adherence.
NIST AI Risk Management Framework controls and their Sgraal coverage mapping. No auth required.
Set per-domain decision thresholds. Overrides the default warn/ask_user/block boundaries for the specified domain.
Retrieve current decision thresholds for a domain. Returns defaults if no custom thresholds are configured.
List pending approval requests for heals that require human review (high-tier healing actions in regulated domains).
List all available plugins and their activation status.
Activate a plugin for your account. Plugin takes effect on the next preflight call.
Deactivate a previously activated plugin.
Anomaly signals for API key usage: unusual call patterns, geographic anomalies, rate spikes.
Validate a .sgraal policy configuration without applying it. Returns validation errors if any.
Apply a .sgraal policy configuration. Takes effect immediately for subsequent preflight calls.
Create a named policy in the policy registry. Can be applied later by name.
Apply a previously created named policy by name.
Current status of production validation campaigns (calibration curves, threshold analysis).
Physical constants of the scoring engine: kappa_MEM, Weibull parameters, weight vectors, normalization factors.
Convert any memory format (mem0, langchain, raw) to Sgraal MemCube v3 schema. Supports bulk conversion.
One-shot: convert source format to MemCube AND run preflight scoring in a single call.
Configure per-domain SLA thresholds and alert webhooks.
Current SLA compliance status per domain. Returns breach count, average omega, and uptime.
Trigger automated corpus calibration. Classifies mismatches and suggests threshold adjustments.
Retrieve the latest calibration report with mismatch analysis and suggested changes.
Calibration cases flagged as ambiguous, requiring human judgment to resolve.
Resolve an ambiguous calibration case. Resolution types: corpus_wrong, threshold_wrong, ambiguous.
